description: All rails grouped by power state (sleep domain). G3H = always present with AC, AON = always on with battery, S2-S0 = progressively more awake. M3 MacBook Pro 14" with HDMI/SD Pro features.

domains.name: G3H
domains.description: Present whenever AC power is connected (pre-charger, pre-battery)

domains.name: AON
domains.description: Always on when battery or charger connected. Stays up in all sleep states.
domains.pmu: U5700 (SVR AON) generates PP3V8_AON; MPMU/SPMU LDOs generate AON sub-rails

domains.name: S2
domains.description: System sleep / standby. Memory retention active. Most peripherals off.

domains.name: S1
domains.description: Light sleep. Core SoC domains retained at low voltage.

domains.name: S0_AWAKE
domains.description: Fully awake. SoC running, display on, all dynamic domains active.
domains.pmu: MPMU (U8100) + SPMU (U7700) DVFS bucks and switches
